ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* IMO number of the vessel */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., container, tanker, bulk carrier) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel in meters */,
  "beam" REAL /* Beam of the vessel in meters */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft of the vessel in meters */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the vessel */,
  "net_tonnage" REAL /* Net tonnage of the vessel */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  "flag_state" TEXT /* Flag state of the vessel */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the vessel */,
  "classification_society" TEXT /* Classification society of the vessel */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vessel (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel making the voyage */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Departure port of the voyage */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Arrival port of the voyage */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the voyage */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the voyage */,
  "voyage_status" TEXT /* Status of the voyage (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time of the voyage */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the voyage */,
  "cargo_type" TEXT /* Type of cargo being transported */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of the cargo in metric tons */,
  "cargo_volume" REAL /* Volume of the cargo in cubic meters */,
  "crew_size" INTEGER /* Number of crew members on the voyage */,
  "cargo_manifest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cargo manifest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_cargo_manifest_id FOREIGN KEY ("cargo_manifest_id") REFERENCES cargo_manifests ("manifest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the position */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the position */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the position */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vessel at the position */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading of the vessel at the position */,
  "course" REAL /* Course of the vessel at the position */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the position */,
  "sea_conditions" TEXT /* Sea conditions at the position */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility at the position */,
  "water_depth" REAL /* Water depth at the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the metric */,
  "engine_revolutions" REAL /* Engine revolutions per minute */,
  "propeller_pitch" REAL /* Propeller pitch in degrees */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption in liters per hour */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the engine */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the engine */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the electrical system */,
  "current" REAL /* Current of the electrical system */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the vessel */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Fuel level in the tanks */,
  "oil_level" REAL /* Oil level in the engine */,
  "water_level" REAL /* Water level in the ballast tanks */,
  "battery_voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the battery */,
  "battery_current" REAL /* Current of the battery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., speed, heading, course) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eirot" (
  "eirot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EIROT data point */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the EIROT data point */,
  "eirot_value" REAL /* EIROT value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eirot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eirot_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gprot" (
  "gprot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPROT data point */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the GPROT data point */,
  "gprot_value" REAL /* GPROT value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gprot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gprot_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reqrot" (
  "reqrot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each REQROT data point */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the REQROT data point */,
  "reqrot_value" REAL /* REQROT value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reqrot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reqrot_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_manifests" (
  "manifest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo manifest */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "cargo_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cargo */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of the cargo in metric tons */,
  "cargo_volume" REAL /* Volume of the cargo in cubic meters */,
  "shipping_company" TEXT /* Name of the shipping company */,
  "consignor" TEXT /* Name of the consignor */,
  "consignee" TEXT /* Name of the consignee */,
  "loading_port" TEXT /* Port where the cargo was loaded */,
  "discharge_port" TEXT /* Port where the cargo will be discharged */,
  "loading_date" TEXT /* Date when the cargo was loaded */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the cargo will be discharged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manifest_id")
)
